title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account linked to a Tenant
scenario: Verify data correctness after transitioning from Guest to an Account linked to a Tenant
steps: 1) Install the app and go as Guest. Check data in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
2) Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account, login with account linked to a Tenant, then go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
expected: 1) App version is correct; Tenant name, tenant id, user id are None; Last connected: unknown. 2) Tenant info is properly displayed.
